strap: Belfast Fintech draws £244m of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,501 grants, anchored by Queen'S University Belfast (87%), with Northern Ireland Dept For The Economy and Volunteer Now on the industrial side. 10 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £24m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows low-confidence "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
